name_en: Chane🌱New Large Chain Cosmetic Bag with Mirror Inside
name_cn:
Chane🌱New Large Chain Cosmetic Bag with Mirror Inside
This new box bag actually has a handle! I'm totally in love with the real thing 😌 It has a completely different vibe. Surprise + Amazement! Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld! Fits daily essentials like lipstick 💄, compact powder, keys, etc. The highlight is that it can also hold a large phone 📱 💅
Size: 9.5× 17 ×8cm
No.: 66021
With packaging
